item.description: Hi👋 I am Ana Ezquerro I am a research engineer at the LyS Group (University of A Coruña). I previously obtained a BSc in Data Science and Engineering (July 2023), and, recently, a MSc in Artificial Intelligence (February 2025). My initial research covers time series analysis and machine learning algorithms applied to statistics. Right now I am working on graph/tree parsing and efficient and human-like language representations. On September 2025, I will start a PhD in Efficient and Trustworthy Learning Algorithms at TU Graz/IML under the supervision of Ozan Özdenizci.
